# Discover — Explore tab vocabulary

> **Play** — use the patch · **Build** — edit, compile · **Explore** — browse and install.

## Top tabs — locked (Build / Play / Explore)

These three tab labels are **fixed**. Do not rename, reorder in copy, or substitute synonyms.

| Tab | Customer meaning | Use in copy | Never use (customer copy) |
|-----|------------------|-------------|---------------------------|
| **Play** | Perform with the loaded patch — knobs, custom UI, minimal chrome | “Switch to **Play**”, “Share from **Play**”, “Play mode” (docs only if needed) | Present, Presentation, Presentation Mode |
| **Build** | Author and compile — editor, Console, Assistant | “Open **Build**”, “**Build** tab”, “in **Build**” | Lab, Lab Mode, DSP Lab, Authoring path, Build Mode *(drop “Mode”)* |
| **Explore** | Browse local presets, community patches, install from link, manage shared links | “Switch to **Explore**”, “browse community patches”, “install from link” | Hub *(as tab or primary nav label)*, Explorer, Amorph Hub *(as tab)* |

**Canonical one-liner** (from [`UX_WORKFLOW.md`](UX_WORKFLOW.md)):

> **Play** — use the patch · **Build** — edit, compile, console / assistant · **Explore** — browse and install community patches.

### Related workflow terms (unchanged)

| Term | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| **Console** | Right strip: log, compile output, errors (`own_ai` / unchosen) |
| **Assistant** | Right strip: built-in Ask / Auto-build (`amorph`) |
| **Ask / Auto-build** | Assistant sub-modes (not Chat / Agent) |
| **Share…** | Play toolbar button — never “Update link” on the button label |
| **Patch** | The `.amorph` product unit; “preset” = snapshot inside a patch |

---

---

## Explore — user-facing model

**Explore** is the **only** customer name for the third top tab and everything reachable from it.

```
Explore (plugin tab)
├── Local          — presets on disk / UserPresets
├── Community      — browse catalog, install, detail view
├── Shared links   — “my shared links” (mine list)
├── Install from link — paste or open share URL
└── Publish flow   — opened from Play **Share…**; preview/success UI lives in Explore WebView
```

### Use in customer copy

| Concept | Preferred phrasing | Notes |
|---------|-------------------|-------|
| Third tab | **Explore** | Tab `title`, empty states, help, settings privacy |
| Browse catalog | “browse **community patches**”, “**Community**” *(source tab label)* | Tab inside Explore WebView |
| On-disk presets | **Local** *(source tab label)* | Paired with Community — not a top-level tab |
| Install | “install from link”, “install patch”, “Use” on card | Share landing: “Switch to **Explore**” |
| Account / session | “sign in to share”, “your shared links” | Avoid “Hub account” in user strings |
| Preview in Explore | “Preview opens in **Explore**” | Not “open Hub” |

---

## Share & publish — unlisted only

Locked in [`HUB_SHARE_STATUS.md`](HUB_SHARE_STATUS.md) § Product decisions:

- **Unlisted only** — no public Community listing copy in publish UI.
- One Play toolbar button: **Share…** (update vs new link explained **only inside** the share dialog).
- Share URL: `https://share.artistsindsp.com/p/{uuid}`
- No **Make variant** UI — fork/lineage is silent.
- Patch card: `@amorph/patch-share-ui` — one card model across web + Explore WebView.

### Customer copy for sharing

| Situation | Say | Do not say |
|-----------|-----|------------|
| Play toolbar | **Share…** | Update link *(on button)*, Publish to Hub |
| Dialog — new link | Share link, copy link, unlisted link | List on Community, public listing, post to Hub |
| Dialog — existing | Update link *(inside dialog only)* | Make variant |
| After publish | “Link copied”, success hero card | “Now live on Community catalog” |
| Tooltip (mine cache) | “Already shared — opens update flow” | Hub-specific jargon |

When describing what sharing *does*, emphasize **unlisted link anyone with the URL can install** — not catalog visibility or Community browse promotion.

---

---

## Community vs Local (inside Explore)

Both are **source tabs inside Explore**, not top-level tabs.

| Label | Meaning | Customer copy |
|-------|---------|---------------|
| **Local** | User’s on-disk patches / UserPresets browse | “**Local** patches”, “browse **Local**” |
| **Community** | Server catalog browse + install | “**Community**”, “community patches”, “Community browse” *(visibility copy in card spec)* |

**Community Hub** is never valid — not as a tab, heading, subtitle, or auth string.

---

---

## Explore home (browse)

**Entry:** Explore tab, or return from detail / install preview / shared links.

**Chrome (always visible):**

- **Local** / **Community** source tabs
- **Install from link** — paste a UUID or `share.artistsindsp.com/p/…` link
- **Sign In** or **@username** menu (Shared links, Account, Sign out)

**Community browse:**

- Search patches
- Sort: Top Ranked, Newest, Most Installed
- Grid cards: hover **▶ Use** to install, **↓ Save** to add without loading, or open detail on click
- Already-installed patches show **▶ Open**

**Local browse:**

- Your on-disk patches from the current plugin variant (Instrument, FX, or MIDI)
- Sort: Recently Used, Date Modified, By Name, By Category, By Author
- Click a row to open the patch in Play

---

## View a Community patch (detail)

**Entry:** Click a browse card (not Use/Save).

**Back:** Returns to browse (not “Back to Explore” — see contradictions).

**Content:** Full patch card at top; below: Community stats, lineage, tags, license.

**Actions:**

- **Install** — loads patch into Play (with conflict handling if same name exists locally)
- **Like** / **Liked**
- Wrong plugin variant (e.g. Instrument patch in FX Amorph): warning instead of Install — *“This is an Instrument patch — open Amorph Instrument to install.”*

---
